name: Arthur — born 10 May 1960, reached State Pension age two days ago
note: The same table, other side: 66 years 2 months lands on 10 July 2026 — two days before this battery's as-of date. The gate opens.
checked: Pensions Act 1995 Sch 4 para 1 Table 3 row (66y2m for 6 May–5 Jun 1960 births), legislation.gov.uk revised text, 2026-07-11.

winter-fuel-payment.because: £200 for your household this winter, paid automatically in November or December — no claim needed for most people, and nothing is recovered at your incomes.
